title: Applied Kinetic recipe fix
description: Fix the Create: AK processors assembly for Neoforge 1.21.1
body:
This datapack adds back the Sequenced Assembly recipe compat between Create and AE2, that was broken in Create: Applied Kinetics.

Report bugs at https://github.com/minhperry/Create-AK-Fix-Issues

# Requires Create, AE2 and Applied Kinetics addon

## Installation:

### Singleplayer
Drop the zip into `.minecraft/saves/<world name>/datapacks/`

### Multiplayer
Drop the zip into `world/datapacks/`

### KubeJS
Drop the zip into `kubejs/data/`


## Test Environment
Only tested on NeoForge 1.21.1 with Create 6.0.6, Applied Energistics 19.2.14 and Applied Kinetics 1.5.2
